title: tigridia orthantha
intro: Tigridia orthantha, also known as the Mexican shell flower or tiger flower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Iridaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tigridia orthantha include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
